notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jared Young to 3rd. Mark Vientos out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jared Young to 3rd. Mark Vientos out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Tyrone Taylor scores. Luis Robert Jr. scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos singles on a ground ball to third baseman Matt Chapman. Luis Torrens scores. Mark Vientos to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Matt Chapman.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens pops out to catcher Patrick Bailey in foul territory.
